subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-02-06
subcodes.first_line: The pilgrims were at Acca yesterday. I am now planning to go there myself to visit the Holy Tomb of the Blessed Perfection. Such a holy visit depends however upon the condition of the heart.
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
